# rubrik_snapshot (Data Source)

The `rubrik_snapshot` data source looks up the closest snapshot to a given
point in time for a workload object.

Exactly one of `before_time` or `after_time` must be specified:

- `before_time` — returns the latest snapshot with date <= the given timestamp.
- `after_time` — returns the earliest snapshot with date >= the given timestamp.

Only clean snapshots are returned by default. Set `exclude_quarantined` or
`exclude_anomalous` to `false` to include those snapshot types.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workload_id` (String) Workload ID (UUID).

### Optional

- `after_time` (String) Return the earliest snapshot with date >= this RFC 3339 timestamp (e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z). Mutually exclusive with ´before_time´.
- `before_time` (String) Return the latest snapshot with date <= this RFC 3339 timestamp (e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z). Mutually exclusive with ´after_time´.
- `exclude_anomalous` (Boolean) Exclude anomalous snapshots.
- `exclude_quarantined` (Boolean) Exclude quarantined snapshots.

### Read-Only

- `date` (String) Snapshot timestamp.
- `id` (String) Snapshot ID (UUID).
